creator: james.wright@digital-chaos.com
text:
Created attachment 209121
sysutils/apache-mesos diff

Revert the patch added last week which fixed the breakage caused by the update of the grpc dependency from 1.22 -> 1.24, due to the grpc update then being reverted. https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=241594

Changes;
1) Remove the patch "patch-3rdparty_libprocess_include_process_grpc.hpp"
2) Bumped PORTREVISION
